emails.subject: Hawaii 125-0 Conference Call
emails.body: Angela: Will you be available? I was hoping that you can handle these deals with swap group assistance. Please feel free to call upon me at any time. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 11/09/2000 04:05 PM Brian Steinbrueck@ENRON 11/09/2000 02:52 PM

emails.subject: Re: Hawaii 125-0 Conference Call
emails.body: Re: Hawaii 125-0 Conference Call I can. Do we listen to these even when the topic is not directly swap related? Angela D. Davis Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, Suite 3842 Houston, Texas 77002 Tele. (713) 345-8347 Fax: (713) 646-3393 e-mail: angela.davis@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Hawaii 125-0 Conference Call
emails.body: Not really. I usually ask to be conferenced in when the swap is discussed, give my comments to Danny Sullivan only (if A&K is outside counsel) or listen to as much as I need to. It's really your call. SS Angela Davis@ENRON 11/09/2000 04:18 PM
